title: acilepis lobbii
intro: Acilepis lobbii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to India and Southeast Asia. It is also known as Lobb's tickseed or Lobb's Bidens. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its various health benefits. Acilepis lobbii is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers are used in traditional medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments, as well as to promote digestion and respiratory health.
